meta.source: vancouver_scraper.py v6 (official_website field added to all categories)
meta.region: Greater Vancouver (Vancouver / Richmond / Burnaby / North Van / Surrey)

schema_version.official_website: universal — real homepage URL or null; hiking = AllTrails detail page

entries.name: Kirin Seafood Restaurant

videos.summary: 食评人深探 Kirin 全菜单，重点试吃清蒸龙虾与片皮鸭，厨房近距离揭秘。
周末早茶 vlog：推车点心实况，虾饺皮薄透明引发弹幕刷屏。

reviews.text: Hands down the best Cantonese in Downtown. The steamed fish is incredible.
叉烧是全温哥华最嫩的那种，肥瘦比例完美，配白饭能吃三碗！

entries.description: Downtown 经典粤菜海鲜楼，炭烧叉烧与清蒸游水海鲜是招牌，商务宴请首选。

videos.summary: 食评人深探 Kirin 全菜单，重点试吃清蒸龙虾与片皮鸭，厨房近距离揭秘。
周末早茶 vlog：推车点心实况，虾饺皮薄透明引发弹幕刷屏。

reviews.text: Hands down the best Cantonese in Downtown. The steamed fish is incredible.
叉烧是全温哥华最嫩的那种，肥瘦比例完美，配白饭能吃三碗！

entries.name: Sura Korean Cuisine

videos.summary: 温哥华美食频道专题：Sura 宫廷套餐全流程，7 道菜一镜到底展示。
炭火烤牛肋骨特写，油脂滴落瞬间引来百万次观看。

reviews.text: Authentic royal court presentation. The galbi is melt-in-your-mouth good.
宫廷摆盘真的太美了，海鲜煎饼外酥里嫩！

entries.description: Downtown 精致韩餐，宫廷风格摆盘，烤牛肋骨与海鲜煎饼受本地食客高度评价。

videos.summary: 温哥华美食频道专题：Sura 宫廷套餐全流程，7 道菜一镜到底展示。
炭火烤牛肋骨特写，油脂滴落瞬间引来百万次观看。

reviews.text: Authentic royal court presentation. The galbi is melt-in-your-mouth good.
宫廷摆盘真的太美了，海鲜煎饼外酥里嫩！

entries.name: Golden Great Wall Restaurant

videos.summary: Richmond 早茶大挑战：单人一小时内吃遍推车菜单，结局超预期。
本地华人博主带父母吃早茶，萝卜糕同款复刻对比评测。

reviews.text: Best dim sum in Richmond. Show up by 9am or wait 45 minutes on weekends.
肠粉皮薄如纸，虾饺馅料饱满，推车阿姨服务特别亲切！

entries.description: Richmond 人气早茶老店，虾饺、肠粉、萝卜糕必点，周末翻台率极高。

videos.summary: Richmond 早茶大挑战：单人一小时内吃遍推车菜单，结局超预期。
本地华人博主带父母吃早茶，萝卜糕同款复刻对比评测。

reviews.text: Best dim sum in Richmond. Show up by 9am or wait 45 minutes on weekends.
肠粉皮薄如纸，虾饺馅料饱满，推车阿姨服务特别亲切！

entries.name: Sun Sui Wah Seafood Restaurant

videos.summary: 温哥华最佳乳鸽评测：Sun Sui Wah 片皮乳鸽现场片制全纪录。
龙虾生猛下锅实况，姜葱炒制香气飘满整层楼。

reviews.text: The squab is unmatched — crispy skin, juicy meat. A Vancouver institution since the 80s.
全温哥华最好吃的乳鸽在这里！家庭聚餐必来。

entries.description: Main Street 老牌海鲜粤菜馆，以片皮乳鸽与波士顿龙虾闻名大温，家庭聚餐首选。

videos.summary: 温哥华最佳乳鸽评测：Sun Sui Wah 片皮乳鸽现场片制全纪录。
龙虾生猛下锅实况，姜葱炒制香气飘满整层楼。

reviews.text: The squab is unmatched — crispy skin, juicy meat. A Vancouver institution since the 80s.
全温哥华最好吃的乳鸽在这里！家庭聚餐必来。

entries.name: Gyo-O Korean BBQ

videos.summary: 深夜烤肉实况：Gyo-O 单人自助挑战，小菜续了 7 次的真实记录。
Burnaby 韩烤横向评测第一名，Gyo-O 牛舌 vs 和牛五花盲测对决。

reviews.text: Unlimited banchan refills and the beef tongue is buttery smooth. Best KBBQ value in GVA.
五花肉切得厚度刚好，烤到微焦卷着生菜吃，小菜不限续！

entries.description: Burnaby 本地最火烤肉店，牛舌与五花肉套餐配无限续杯小菜，性价比极高。

videos.summary: 深夜烤肉实况：Gyo-O 单人自助挑战，小菜续了 7 次的真实记录。
Burnaby 韩烤横向评测第一名，Gyo-O 牛舌 vs 和牛五花盲测对决。

reviews.text: Unlimited banchan refills and the beef tongue is buttery smooth. Best KBBQ value in GVA.
五花肉切得厚度刚好，烤到微焦卷着生菜吃，小菜不限续！

entries.name: The Keefer Bar

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: The Keefer Bar 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: The Keefer Bar 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Hidden gem in Chinatown! Creative cocktail menu — the Jade Dragon is a must-try. Intimate lighting and knowledgeable bartenders make it perfect for date nights.
唐人街隐藏宝藏吧！招牌 Jade Dragon 颜值与口感并存，氛围私密适合约会，调酒师超专业，强烈推荐！

entries.signature_drink: Jade Dragon (green tea vodka, lychee, lime)

entries.name: Guilt & Co

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Guilt & Co 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Guilt & Co 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Best underground bar in Vancouver. Live music every night, exceptional craft cocktails, and a speakeasy vibe that makes every visit memorable.
温哥华最有氛围的地下酒吧！每晚现场音乐表演，精酿鸡尾酒一流，像穿越到老式地下酒廊，朋友聚会必选！

entries.signature_drink: Gastown Gin Fizz (local gin, elderflower, egg white)

TikTok 热门: Guilt & Co 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

entries.name: UVA Wine & Cocktail Bar

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: UVA Wine & Cocktail Bar 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: UVA Wine & Cocktail Bar 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Sophisticated wine bar with an impressive selection. The smoked Old Fashioned is exceptional. Ideal for business drinks or a refined evening out in downtown Vancouver.
高级感酒吧首选！烟熏老时髦调制精良，葡萄酒单丰富，商务聚会或高端约会必来，服务细致周到！

entries.signature_drink: Smoked Old Fashioned (bourbon, maple bitters, rosemary smoke)

entries.name: The Diamond

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: The Diamond 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: The Diamond 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Classic Gastown cocktail bar with impeccable drinks. The Last Word is perfectly balanced and the bartenders are passionate about their craft. Great rooftop views too.
Gastown 经典调酒圣地！Last Word 堪称全温哥华最平衡的鸡尾酒，调酒师专业度极高，有屋顶露台超适合拍照！

entries.signature_drink: Last Word (gin, green chartreuse, maraschino, lime)

TikTok 热门: The Diamond 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Playdium Burnaby 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Playdium Burnaby 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Awesome entertainment complex for all ages. Hundreds of arcade games, bumper cars, and bowling. Kids and adults both had a blast — great value with the card system.
全家出游首选！游戏种类超多，碰碰车和保龄球一起玩，小孩大人都嗨翻，储值卡超划算，周末必去！

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Playdium Burnaby 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。

entries.name: Rec Room Vancouver
entries.address: 585 Great Northern Way, Vancouver, BC V5T 1E1

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Rec Room Vancouver 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Rec Room Vancouver 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Vancouver's premier entertainment destination. Axe throwing, VR experiences, and amazing food all under one roof. Perfect for corporate events and group outings.
温哥华最强娱乐综合体！斧头投掷 + VR 体验 + 美食一站搞定，团建聚会必来，热门时段记得提前预约！

entries.name: Cineplex Odeon International Village
entries.address: 88 W Pender St, Vancouver, BC V6B 6N9

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Cineplex Odeon International Village 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Cineplex Odeon International Village 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Conveniently located in downtown with stadium seating and a great sound system. The IMAX experience is worth the upgrade. Plenty of parking nearby on weekends.
地段超好的市中心影院！IMAX 音效震撼，座椅舒适宽敞，首映日热门场次提前买票，停车方便！

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Cineplex Odeon International Village 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Commodore Ballroom 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Commodore Ballroom 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Iconic Vancouver live music venue with a legendary sprung dance floor. The acoustics are phenomenal and every show feels intimate despite the capacity. A true Vancouver institution.
温哥华传奇音乐现场！弹簧舞池跳舞感觉超棒，音响效果顶级，每场演出都像私人专场，提前关注演出日历！

entries.name: Stanley Park

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Stanley Park 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Stanley Park 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: World-class urban park right in Vancouver. The seawall walk and bike path offer stunning ocean and mountain views. Totem poles and the aquarium are absolute highlights.
温哥华必去城市公园！海堤单车道风景绝美，图腾柱超有历史感，强烈建议租自行车绕一圈，日落时分最美！

entries.description: 温哥华最大城市公园，海堤骑行与图腾柱地标。

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Stanley Park 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Stanley Park 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: World-class urban park right in Vancouver. The seawall walk and bike path offer stunning ocean and mountain views. Totem poles and the aquarium are absolute highlights.
温哥华必去城市公园！海堤单车道风景绝美，图腾柱超有历史感，强烈建议租自行车绕一圈，日落时分最美！

entries.name: Granville Island Public Market

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Granville Island Public Market 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Granville Island Public Market 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Vancouver's vibrant public market with fresh local produce, artisan crafts, and incredible street food. The atmosphere on weekends is electric. A must-visit for foodies and shoppers.
温哥华最有活力的公共市场！本地海鲜超新鲜，手工艺品琳琅满目，街头表演随时上演，拍照圣地周末必打卡！

entries.description: 艺术家聚集的公共市场，本地海鲜与手工艺品云集。

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Granville Island Public Market 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Granville Island Public Market 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Vancouver's vibrant public market with fresh local produce, artisan crafts, and incredible street food. The atmosphere on weekends is electric. A must-visit for foodies and shoppers.
温哥华最有活力的公共市场！本地海鲜超新鲜，手工艺品琳琅满目，街头表演随时上演，拍照圣地周末必打卡！

entries.name: Capilano Suspension Bridge Park
entries.address: 3735 Capilano Rd, North Vancouver, BC V7R 4J1

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Capilano Suspension Bridge Park 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Capilano Suspension Bridge Park 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Thrilling experience high above the Capilano River. The Treetops Adventure and Cliffwalk extend the experience beyond the bridge. Worth every penny for a full day of adventure.
刺激又壮观！站在 137 米悬索桥上俯瞰峡谷令人窒息，林冠探险和悬崖步道也超好玩，门票含全套项目非常值！

entries.description: 137 米高空悬索桥横跨峡谷，林冠探险全年开放。

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Capilano Suspension Bridge Park 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Capilano Suspension Bridge Park 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Thrilling experience high above the Capilano River. The Treetops Adventure and Cliffwalk extend the experience beyond the bridge. Worth every penny for a full day of adventure.
刺激又壮观！站在 137 米悬索桥上俯瞰峡谷令人窒息，林冠探险和悬崖步道也超好玩，门票含全套项目非常值！

entries.name: Museum of Anthropology (MOA)
entries.address: 6393 NW Marine Dr, Vancouver, BC V6T 1Z2

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Museum of Anthropology (MOA) 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Museum of Anthropology (MOA) 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: World-renowned museum showcasing First Nations art and culture. The Great Hall with its towering totem poles is breathtaking. Thoughtfully curated and deeply moving exhibits throughout.
UBC 校园内的世界级博物馆！原住民图腾柱壮观震撼，展品背后的故事令人动容，强烈推荐学生和文化爱好者来参观！

entries.description: UBC 校园内人类学博物馆，馆藏原住民图腾与海达文化珍品。

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Museum of Anthropology (MOA) 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Museum of Anthropology (MOA) 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: World-renowned museum showcasing First Nations art and culture. The Great Hall with its towering totem poles is breathtaking. Thoughtfully curated and deeply moving exhibits throughout.
UBC 校园内的世界级博物馆！原住民图腾柱壮观震撼，展品背后的故事令人动容，强烈推荐学生和文化爱好者来参观！

entries.name: Grouse Grind
entries.address: 6400 Nancy Greene Way, North Vancouver, BC V7R 4K9

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Grouse Grind 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Grouse Grind 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: The ultimate Vancouver fitness challenge — 853m elevation in 2.9km. Brutal but incredibly rewarding. Take the gondola down and grab a cold beer at the summit chalet.
温哥华最硬核的徒步挑战！全程上坡腿软但顶部景色无敌，爬完坐缆车下山，山顶喝一杯超满足，建议早上出发！

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Grouse Grind 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Grouse Grind 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: The ultimate Vancouver fitness challenge — 853m elevation in 2.9km. Brutal but incredibly rewarding. Take the gondola down and grab a cold beer at the summit chalet.
温哥华最硬核的徒步挑战！全程上坡腿软但顶部景色无敌，爬完坐缆车下山，山顶喝一杯超满足，建议早上出发！

entries.name: Lynn Peak Trail
entries.address: 3403 Boundary Rd, North Vancouver, BC V7H 2V7

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Lynn Peak Trail 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Lynn Peak Trail 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Fantastic moderate hike in Lynn Headwaters. The summit views of Indian Arm and the North Shore mountains are spectacular. Well-marked trail — bring plenty of water and layers.
北温隐藏精华步道！顶部印度湾全景视野令人震惊，难度适中，适合有一定体力的徒步爱好者，停车场早到为妙！

entries.trailhead: Lynn Headwaters Regional Park main parking lot

TikTok 热门: Lynn Peak Trail 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Fantastic moderate hike in Lynn Headwaters. The summit views of Indian Arm and the North Shore mountains are spectacular. Well-marked trail — bring plenty of water and layers.

entries.name: Dog Mountain via Dinkey Peak
entries.address: 1700 Mt Seymour Rd, North Vancouver, BC V7G 1L3

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Dog Mountain via Dinkey Peak 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Dog Mountain via Dinkey Peak 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Beautiful subalpine meadow hike with panoramic Vancouver city views. Accessible in shoulder season. The open ridgeline section is stunning on clear days — highly recommend.
从山顶俯瞰温哥华全城太治愈了！高山草甸美不胜收，难度适中，晴天来视野无敌，强烈推荐秋天红叶季来！

entries.trailhead: Mt Seymour Provincial Park — Parking Lot 4

entries.name: Quarry Rock (Deep Cove)
entries.address: Panorama Dr, North Vancouver, BC V7G 1V8

videos.summary: YouTube 精选: Quarry Rock (Deep Cove) 本地博主深度实探与体验评测。
TikTok 热门: Quarry Rock (Deep Cove) 打卡攻略与真实体验合集。

reviews.text: Perfect beginner-friendly hike with a stunning viewpoint over Deep Cove and Indian Arm. Only 3.7km but the payoff is massive. Grab a Honey Doughnuts in Deep Cove after — a local tradition.
入门级徒步首推！才 3.7 公里就能看到 Deep Cove 海湾全景，风景值爆表，下山后去 Deep Cove 吃甜甜圈是本地传统！

entries.trailhead: Deep Cove Park trailhead — Panorama Dr street parking
